description: Authoring reference — valid magic school slugs per game system. Spell rows use the required `school` field in palladium-magic.schema.json; O.C.C. `ppeEngine.magicSchools` lists which schools a practitioner may learn.

nightbane.label: Nightbane

schools.label: Necromancy
schools.notes: Necromancer O.C.C. only; distinct from per-spell magicKind necromancy delivery.

nightbane.selectionRules: Spell picks are gated by O.C.C. magicSchools and progressionRoadmap level caps (e.g. Level 1 Spells Only at 1st level).
